mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM access_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ip) FROM access_log WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM access_log WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT ip) AS count FROM access_log WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date
SELECT username, ip, MAX(user_agent) AS userAgent, MAX(create_time) AS lastActiveTime FROM access_log GROUP BY ip, username ORDER BY lastActiveTime DESC LIMIT #{limit}
